title: hesreallyhim/awesome-claude-code
abstract: A curated list of awesome skills, hooks, slash-commands, agent orchestrators, applications, and plugins for Claude Code by Anthropic
abstract_zh: **awesome-claude-code** 绝对是你们写周报、调Bug时的超级小帮手！它不仅功能强大，还能大大提升效率，就像你的私人AI助理，随时帮你搞定技术难题。赶紧试试吧，保证让你们的工作变得更轻松愉快！
